response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video. The content consists of a promotional dialogue between members of the VTuber group HoloX. The background audio consists exclusively of instrumental music. No songs with vocals (singing) were detected.
response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring five HoloX VTubers (La+, Lui, Koyori, Chloe, Iroha) discussing an upcoming collaboration event. The video features only instrumental background music and dialogue.

scenes.description: The video displays the five HoloX VTubers talking in a virtual room setting, discussing upcoming events, with instrumental background music playing throughout the entire clip.
